steps.title: Use slope intercept form
steps.content:
A line with the given slope has this form.
$$y=\frac{1}{8}x+b$$

steps.title: Substitute the point
steps.content:
Use the given point to find $b$.
$$-6=\frac{1}{8}(40)+b$$
$$-6=5+b$$
$$b=-11$$

steps.title: Write the equation
steps.content:
Substitute the intercept into the line equation.
$$y=\frac{x}{8}-11$$
The answer is B.
